customAttributes.description:
When Peter Parker enters, create a 2/1 green Spider creature token with reach.
1GWU: Transform Peter Parker. Activate only as a sorcery.
//
Amazing Spider-Man
Vigilance, reach
Each legendary spell you cast that’s one or more colors has web-slinging GWU. (You may cast a spell for its web-slinging cost if you also return a tapped creature you control to its owner’s hand.)
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 09/26/2025. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
customAttributes.fullType: Legendary Creature — Human Scientist Hero // Legendary Creature — Spider Human Hero
customAttributes.flavorText:
"I heard you were making my favorite, Aunt May..."
//
“… and I couldn’t wait to swing by.”
